nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Turdus
nodes.summary: Turdus（Turdus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联91种鸟类，如梅林 (亞瑟王傳說)、Ethiopian thrush、非洲地鸫等91种鸟类。

nodes.name: Somali thrush
nodes.summary: Somali thrush（Turdus ludoviciae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Somali thrush。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 脊索动物门
nodes.summary: 脊索动物门（Chordata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Somali thrush
nodes.summary: The Somali thrush (Turdus ludoviciae), also known as the Somali blackbird, is a songbird species in the family Turdidae. It is endemic to Somalia. It has a black head and breast, yellow bill, brown back and wings and a grey belly with red sides. Its natural habitats are montane juniper woodlands and open areas between 1,300 and 2,000 m. It is threatened by habitat loss and was formerly classified as Critically Endangered by the IUCN. Recent research has found that the loss of habitat is not as severe as first feared and the species is downlisted to Least Concern in 2021. Local conservation efforts have apparently aided in the protection of forests. Footnotes References BirdLife International (BLI) (2008): [2008 IUCN Redlist status changes]. Retrieved 2008-MAY-23. External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
